adaptation_disclosure: The exact upstream U-Net in tools/LoadModel.py is not modified.
The exact upstream MSE-minus-0.1-Pearson loss in tools/LossFunction.py is not modified.
The exact upstream learn/Training.training loop is called through a PyTorch compatibility wrapper.
Per-record target min-max normalization is replaced by folds-1-7 fixed per-lead scaling to prevent missing-target amplitude leakage and support raw-mV evaluation.
Training and evaluation are restricted to the published lead-I single-input task; ECGrecover is excluded from arbitrary-mask parity claims.
Unobserved input leads use deterministic random-valued masking and the observed lead is restored bit-for-bit after inference.

Inference accepts homogeneous record batches, loads the unchanged U-Net and checkpoint once per process, and uses fixed 64-record device micro-batches; batching changes execution only, not model inputs or outputs.
